patch.value: Dedup create/update parsers + optional command-file splits

Code-quality audit findings (no CI violation; 3400-line gate not breached). (1) DEDUP: event/reminder/type-option parsing is near-duplicated between create.ts and update.ts: parseEvents(create:688)/parseEventEntries(update:680), parseReminders/parseReminderEntries, parseTypeOptions/parseTypeOptionEntries — ~120 LOC, byte-equivalent except recurrence-mode ('defined' vs 'truthy') and value accessors. Extract a shared parser parametrized on recurrence-mode + accessor (both files already share recurrence-parsers.js). Highest-value dedup; gate with existing create/update specs. (2) Optional cohesion splits (aspirational <2000 LOC guideline, not enforced): update.ts (2002) move parse/key helpers to a sibling; main.ts (1987) is a grab-bag (telemetry normalization + Sentry wrapping + runtime-field-flags + bootstrap) splittable; loader.ts (1929) barrel-split discovery/manifest/load/activate (the remaining pm-mbdu follow-up). (3) Minor: fileKey/docKey one-liners could collapse to scopePathKey.
create/update share one event/reminder/type-option parser; specs green
